title: epipactis oregana
intro: Epipactis oregana, also known as the Oregon helleborine, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it beneficial for treating various health issues. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and relieving respiratory issues, as well as having antioxidant properties that can help protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Epipactis oregana can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat coughs, colds, and other respiratory problems.
